subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Verily, ages and cycles have passed in every moment, yet thou hast not attained unto the presence of His countenance, nor hearkened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی قد مضی فی کل آن قرون و ادوار و انت ماحضرت فی مقابله الوجه و ماسمعت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @consolation and comfort, @power of prayer, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
